title: Launch Readiness Checklist
shortDescription: Generate a comprehensive pre-launch checklist with cross-functional ownership, go/no-go criteria, and rollback procedures.
jobsToBeDone: Ensure nothing falls through the cracks before a product launch
Coordinate cross-functional teams on launch deliverables
Define clear go/no-go criteria with escalation paths
Plan rollback procedures if launch metrics disappoint

inputs.label: Feature or Product Name
inputs.example: AI Writing Assistant — suggests email drafts, subject lines, and reply tones based on conversation context

inputs.label: Launch Scope
inputs.example: GA launch to all Business plan users (~8,000 accounts). Previously in closed beta with 200 accounts for 6 weeks. Rolling out via feature flag over 3 days (10% → 50% → 100%)

inputs.label: Team & Stakeholders
inputs.example: PM: Sarah, Eng Lead: Marcus, Design: Priya, ML Engineer: Alex, Marketing: Jordan, Support Lead: Kim, Legal: Taylor

inputs.label: Known Risks & Open Items
inputs.example: AI response latency P95 is 2.8s (target <2s), support team needs training on AI-specific escalation, legal review of AI disclosure language pending, no load test beyond 500 concurrent users

inputs.label: Launch Success Criteria
inputs.example: 60% feature adoption within 30 days, AI suggestion acceptance rate >40%, no increase in support ticket volume >10%, P95 latency <2s, no Sev1 incidents in first week
